zh.speaker: A
zh.text: 姐妹，我今天要去约会刚搭了一身，你帮我把把关呗？

zh.speaker: B
zh.text: 哟，露腰上衣配工装裤也太酷了吧，你要不拍个照发朋友圈让大家也鉴赏下？

zh.speaker: A
zh.text: 好主意！我刚才还纠结要不要发呢，你帮我拍张全身照呗？

zh.speaker: B
zh.text: 没问题，站窗边光线好，321，拍好了，你看是不是超出片？

zh.speaker: A
zh.text: 绝了！我现在就发，配文就写“今日出门穿搭，求真实评价~”

zh.speaker: B
zh.text: 哈哈我第一个去评论，必须给你打满分！

en.speaker: A
en.text: Girl, I'm going on a date today and just put together a new look, could you give me some advice?

en.speaker: B
en.text: Wow, that cropped top with cargo pants is so cool! Wanna take a pic and post it on WeChat Moments for a **fit check**?

en.speaker: A
en.text: That's such a good idea! I was just wondering if I should post it. Can you take a full-body shot for me?

en.speaker: B
en.text: No problem. Stand by the window where the light is great. 3,2,1, done! Look at this, isn't it super photogenic?

en.speaker: A
en.text: It's amazing! I'm gonna post it right now with the caption 'Today's going-out fit, honest opinions please~'

en.speaker: B
en.text: Haha I'll be the first to comment, I'm definitely giving you a full score!

definitions.en: A slang term referring to a request, photo or social media post that asks others to comment on one's full outfit.
definitions.zh: 网络俚语，指请求他人评价自己的全身穿搭，也指社交平台上发布的用于征求穿搭评价的照片或帖子。

definitions.en: The act of showing off one's outfit and inviting feedback from others.
definitions.zh: 展示自身穿搭并征求他人反馈的行为。

examples.en: I posted a **fit check** on TikTok before heading to the concert last weekend.
examples.zh: 上周末去演唱会之前，我在抖音上发了一条穿搭求评动态。

examples.en: My best friend always does a quick **fit check** with me before she goes to any important occasion.
examples.zh: 我闺蜜去任何重要场合前，总会快速让我看看她的穿搭怎么样。

examples.en: The **fit check** shared by that fashion blogger got over 100k likes in an hour.
examples.zh: 那位时尚博主分享的穿搭求评帖一小时内就获得了10万多赞。
